hero_sub: We’re here to help you feel better, faster. Compassionate, specialist psychiatric care — with the calm of a family doctor and the depth of an expert.
stat1: Years of clinical experience in specialist psychiatry
svc_intro: From a first consultation to ongoing therapy and medication care, here’s the full range of specialist psychiatric support Dr. Lila offers — each delivered with warmth, clarity and at the pace that’s right for you.
about_p1: Dr. Lila is a Consultant Psychiatrist with over 14 years caring for adults across the full spectrum of mental health.
about_p2: She blends rigorous, evidence-based medicine with a genuinely human approach — because feeling understood is where healing begins.
chk1: Board-certified by the Nepal Medical Council
chk6: Progress tracking via validated clinical tools (PHQ-9, GAD-7)
j1d: We sit down together, unhurried, to talk through what brought you here — your story, your concerns and what you’re hoping to change.
j2d: A clear, careful evaluation using proven clinical tools, so we understand the full picture before any decisions are made.
j3d: A personalised plan built around your life, goals and preferences — whether that’s therapy, medication or a blend of both.
j4d: Ongoing reviews and gentle check-ins to adjust your care as you progress, for as long as you need our support.
book_intro: No waiting rooms, no phone tag. Just caring, specialist support — booked in minutes.
contact_head: Your wellbeing can’t wait — take the first step today.
contact_intro: Whether you need a consultation, medication review, or ongoing therapy — compassionate specialist care is just one call away.
footer_desc: Compassionate, specialist psychiatric care — designed around how you actually feel, and how you want to heal.

testimonials.quote: Dr. Lila made me feel genuinely heard for the first time in years. Calm, patient, and never rushed. I left with a plan and real hope for the future.
testimonials.name: Maya R.

testimonials.quote: Booking was effortless and I got an appointment the same week. The whole experience feels modern but deeply human. I cannot recommend Dr. Lila enough.
testimonials.name: Thomas C.

testimonials.quote: Thoughtful, knowledgeable and warm. She adjusted my treatment carefully and checked in often. I finally feel like myself again.
testimonials.name: Sofia L.

testimonials.quote: After years of struggling, Dr. Lila helped me understand my condition clearly. The medication plan has been life-changing and I feel supported every step.
testimonials.name: James W.

faqList.q: How does booking an appointment work?
faqList.a: Simply choose a service, pick a day and time, and share a few details. You’ll get instant confirmation by email and SMS — the whole process takes under two minutes.
Life happens. You can reschedule or cancel free of charge up to 24 hours before your appointment, right from your confirmation email.

faqList.q: How should I prepare for my first consultation?
faqList.a: There’s nothing you need to do — just come as you are. If you have a list of current medications or previous reports, bring them along, but it’s entirely optional.
Absolutely. Everything you share is strictly private and held to the highest medical confidentiality standards. Your trust matters deeply to us.
Yes — secure video consultations are available for most services, so you can receive care from wherever feels comfortable for you.

ready_head: Ready to take the first step?
ready_intro: Your health journey starts with one simple step — and you never have to take it alone.

consult.name: General Consultation
consult.headline: Start with a calm, unhurried first conversation.
consult.intro: Your first appointment is a relaxed, 60-minute conversation. We'll explore what's brought you here, your history and your hopes — and leave with a clear, shared sense of the next step.
included: A thorough review of your history & concerns
A clear, written summary and plan
Direct answers to all of your questions
A warm, judgement-free space to talk

steps.title: Before
steps.desc: Share a few details when you book — no dreaded forms.

steps.title: During
steps.desc: We talk through what's on your mind, entirely at your pace.

steps.title: After
steps.desc: You receive a written plan and clear next steps.

anxiety.name: Anxiety & Depression Care
anxiety.headline: Find steady ground again — for anxiety & low mood.
anxiety.intro: Whether it's persistent worry, panic, or a heaviness that won't lift, you don't have to manage it alone. We combine evidence-based treatment with genuine warmth to help you feel like yourself again.
included: Regular reviews to track your progress

steps.title: Understand
steps.desc: We map what you're experiencing and what triggers it.

steps.title: Treat
steps.desc: Together we choose the right blend of support.

steps.title: Recover
steps.desc: We adjust and review until you feel steady again.

meds.name: Medication Management
meds.headline: The right medication, carefully managed.
meds.intro: Getting medication right is a careful, collaborative process. We prescribe thoughtfully, monitor closely and adjust as needed — always explaining the reasoning behind every decision.

steps.title: Review
steps.desc: We assess your current medication and history.

steps.title: Prescribe
steps.desc: A considered plan, fully explained to you.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.desc: Regular check-ins keep it working safely.

assess.name: Diagnostic Assessment
assess.headline: Clarity at last — assessment for ADHD, autism & more.
assess.intro: A structured, in-depth assessment to understand what's really going on. We take the time to get it right, so you leave with answers you can trust and a clear path forward.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.desc: We gather background and any prior reports.

steps.title: Explain
steps.desc: We talk through the findings and next steps.

therapy.name: Therapy & CBT
therapy.headline: Talk it through — therapy & CBT, tailored to you.
therapy.intro: Sometimes the most powerful medicine is being truly heard. Our talking therapy and cognitive techniques are shaped around your goals, your pace and your own story.

steps.title: Connect
steps.desc: We build trust and set your goals together.

steps.title: Work
steps.desc: Session by session, we work the plan.

steps.title: Grow
steps.desc: You carry the tools forward into daily life.

wellness.name: Preventive Mental Wellness
wellness.headline: Stay well, ahead of time.
wellness.intro: Mental wellbeing isn't only about treating illness — it's about staying steady. Proactive check-ins and resilience planning help you protect what matters before things get hard.

steps.title: Check in
steps.desc: A relaxed review of how you're really doing.

steps.title: Plan
steps.desc: We build habits and safeguards that fit your life.

steps.title: Sustain
steps.desc: Light-touch reviews keep you on track.
